rawAssistant: I'm not sure what you're referring to, traveler. I have a bit of trouble with these new... whispers from the wilderward. My thoughts get tangled in the threads of old stories and half-forgotten lore. I've been studying the wardstones here in Lantern Marsh, trying to make sense of the glow that's been seen in the lowlands. It's all so... fragile.
